info.title: Recipients API
info.description: API for managing recipients in split payment scenarios. This feature enables merchants to split payments among multiple recipients, which is particularly beneficial for marketplace models where transactions need to be divided among different sellers or stakeholders.

account_id.description: Unique id of the account in Yuno (MAX 64; MIN 36).

merchant_recipient_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipient defined by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 1).

national_entity.description: Beneficiary's national entity type. Could be INDIVIDUAL or ENTITY.

entity_type.description: The Beneficiary's type of organization. GOVERNMENTAL, PUBLIC, NON_PROFIT, PRIVATE

date_of_birth.description: The Beneficiary's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (MAX 10; MIN 10).

legal_name.description: Beneficiary's name. (MAX 80; MIN 1) Only necessary when national entity is ENTITY.

industry.description: The seller's industry (MAX 235; MIN 1). For more information access the Industry category reference page.

merchant_category_code.description: MCC - The merchant category code (MAX 235; MIN 1).

phone.description: Specifies the customer's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Check the Country reference to see the phone codes. This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the address (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2). Required if address is present.

state.description: The state / province considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

legal_representatives.description: Owners/beneficials of the recipient. Required when `national_entity = ENTITY`.

account_type.description: Beneficiary's bank account type. Allowed values: CHECKINGS, SAVINGS.

country.description: The bank account's country (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2).

currency.description: The bank account's currency (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3).

file_name.description: The name of the documentation sent (MAX 255; MIN 3).

content_type.description: The type of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content_category.description: The category of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content.description: The content of the documentation sent by the merchant encoded in base64. Max size: 2MB.

onboardings.description: Array of onboarding objects for different payment providers

account_id.description: Optional account id for this onboarding. If omitted, the top-level recipient account_id applies.

type.description: Type of onboarding. If its done by Yuno.

description.description: Optional description of the onboarding (MAX 255; MIN 3).

callback_url.description: URL in case to redirect your customer after the onboarding process with the provider, if needed.

connection_id.description: ID of the connection in Yuno

recipient_id.description: The unique identifier of the provider's recipient.

recipient_type.description: The type of recipient for the provider.

documentation.description: Array of documentation objects for this onboarding

file_name.description: The name of the documentation sent (MAX 255; MIN 3).

content_type.description: The type of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content_category.description: The category of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content.description: The content of the documentation sent by the merchant encoded in base64. Max size: 1MB.

account_type.description: Beneficiary's bank account type (MAX 3; MIN 1). Could be: CHECKINGS, SAVINGS, VISTA, PIX_EMAIL, PIX_PHONE, PIX_DOCUMENT_ID, PIX_BANK_ACCOUNT.

country.description: The bank account's country (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2).

currency.description: The bank account's currency (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3).

file_name.description: The name of the documentation sent (MAX 255; MIN 3).

content_type.description: The type of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content_category.description: The category of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content.description: The content of the documentation sent by the merchant encoded in base64. Max size: 1MB.

onboardings.description: Array of onboarding objects for different payment providers

type.description: Type of onboarding. If its done by Yuno.

callback_url.description: URL in case to redirect your customer after the onboarding process with the provider, if needed.

connection_id.description: Id of the connection in Yuno

recipient_id.description: The unique identifier of the provider's recipient.

documentation.description: Array of documentation objects for this onboarding

file_name.description: The name of the documentation sent (MAX 255; MIN 3).

content_type.description: The type of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content_category.description: The category of the documentation sent by the merchant.

content.description: The content of the documentation sent by the merchant encoded in base64. Max size: 1MB.

country.description: The bank account's country (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2).

currency.description: The bank account's currency (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3).

legal_representatives.description: Object to indicate the owners of the organization. Adyen, Stripe and dlocal have fields related to that.

date_of_birth.description: The Legal representative's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (MAX 10; MIN 10).

country.description: The Legal representative's country (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2)

nationality.description: The Legal representative's nationality (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

title.description: The title of the legal representative (MAX 255; MIN 1).

publicly_exposed_person.description: Indicates if the legal representative is a publicly exposed person

ultimate_beneficial_owner.description: Indicates if the legal representative is an ultimate beneficiary owner of the company

acceptance.description: If the terms of service were accepted by the recipient

date.description: Date of the terms of service acceptance

ip.description: IP of the terms of service acceptance

id.description: The unique identifier of the recipient.

account_id.description: The account identifier associated with this recipient.

merchant_recipient_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipient defined by the merchant.

updated_at.description: Last Recipient updated date (ISO 8601 MAX 27; MIN 27).

post.description: Creates  a new recipient for split payment scenarios. This endpoint allows merchants to define recipients that can receive portions of payments in marketplace or split payment models.

messages: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.
